infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Gesture Camera uses the camera to see your hand gestures and take photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Gesture Camera records audio with your 5-second videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Gesture Camera saves your photos and videos to your Photos library.
